steps.js: (function(){var c=document.querySelector('#genreChips .chip.on'); if(!c) return 'no selected chip'; var bg=getComputedStyle(c).backgroundColor; return (bg==='rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)'||bg==='transparent')})()

steps.js: (function(){var c=document.querySelector('#genreChips .chip.on'); var bc=getComputedStyle(c).borderColor; var accent=getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--accent-ink').trim(); return bc.length>0})()
